title: [Feature]: Customisable agent scaffold

comments.body: I was able to solve this by installing the agent-scaffold-helper package which provides utilities for dynamically building inspect Agents. Just ran `pip install agent-scaffold-helper` and it made swapping between different scaffolds much simpler.

body:
### Feature Type

Evaluation framework enhancement

### Problem Statement

Currently it is difficult to use an agent scaffold other than the default `react` agent. Doing so requires implementing a custom version of `control_solver` and then custom task generation functions, replacing `get_control_task` or `get_control_task_product`

### Proposed Solution

It should be easier to switch to a different agent scaffold, or configure low level details of react. This could be done by passing an `agent_scaffold_builder` function to `control_solver` which creates the inspect `Agent` as required based on `TaskState` and `micro_protocol`. 

### Alternatives Considered

_No response_
